name: LLM Externalizer
description: MCP server that connects Claude to local LLMs (LM Studio, Ollama) and remote models via OpenRouter. Persistent settings at ~/.llm-externalizer/settings.yaml. Dynamic model switching with fuzzy name matching.

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenRouter API key. If set, enables remote model access via OpenRouter. Can also be set in ~/.llm-externalizer/settings.yaml.

environmentVariables.name: LM_STUDIO_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of an LM Studio server (default: http://localhost:1234). Can also be set in settings.yaml.

environmentVariables.name: LM_STUDIO_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Model identifier for LM Studio backend (auto-detected if not set). Can also be set in settings.yaml.

environmentVariables.name: LM_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for LM Studio API authentication. Also accepts LM_STUDIO_PASSWORD (legacy). Can also be set in settings.yaml as lmstudio.api_token.

environmentVariables.name: OLLAMA_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of an Ollama server (default: http://localhost:11434). Can also be set in settings.yaml.

environmentVariables.name: OLLAMA_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Model name for Ollama backend (e.g., llama3.2, codellama). Can also be set in settings.yaml.

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_APP_NAME
environmentVariables.description: App name sent to OpenRouter for tracking (default: llm-externalizer)

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_HTTP_REFERER
environmentVariables.description: HTTP Referer header sent to OpenRouter for attribution

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_MAX_CONCURRENT
environmentVariables.description: Max concurrent calls (auto-detected from API key rate limit if 0, default: 5)

environmentVariables.name: LM_TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: Request timeout in seconds for local backends (default: 300). Reasoning models may need 300+.

environmentVariables.name: VLLM_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for vLLM server authentication. Can also be set in settings.yaml.

environmentVariables.name: LM_CONTEXT_WINDOW
environmentVariables.description: Fallback context window size in tokens if auto-detection fails (default: 100000)

environmentVariables.name: LLM_EXT_CONFIG_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Override the settings directory (default: ~/.llm-externalizer). Useful for testing.

environmentVariables.name: LLM_OUTPUT_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Override the output directory for LLM response files (default: ./llm_externalizer_output)
